entry.title: FIFO based Inventory Valuation in Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community members,

Our client needs inventory valuation on basis of FIFO method, please guide us how it can be achieved in public cloud.

 

FIFO based Consumption of material having Price control V and Material Type ROH

  1. GR at Different Price
 

Qty

Rate

Amount

GR1

1000

45

45000

GR2

1000

50

50000

Total

2000

47.5

95000

 

  1. Standard System behavior

Issue

1500

47.5

71250

Remaining

500

47.5

23750

 

 

 

95000

 

  1. As per Requirement shared by client

first GR

1000

45

45000

Second GR

500

50

25000

 

 

 

70000

Remaining

500

50

25000

 

As 2000 Qty of Material is purchased at two different rates, while doing goods issue (consumption) of 1500 Qty Material system should issue first 1000 Qty @45 rate and second 500 Qty @50 and remaining invetory value should be 25000 for Qty 500@50 

As per above scenario valuation should be done on FIFO basis and same should be reflected in report MB5B ( Stocks on Posting Date) or Analyze stocks in Date Range.

MB5B à

Analyze stocks in Date Range

entry.title: Re: Creating Letters with CR
entry.content: Hi  SSystemes24, if you are dealing with a lot of invoices you can also look into a conversion / automation tool...search on "pdf to database" and you should get a bunch of options. This way you'll also have those scans in your database for a new DB-based letter / contract report and any future data analysis that you want to do.

entry.title: 回复： Error creating sap hana trigger
entry.content: The solution worked perfectly for me, thank you very much for the help

entry.title: queue returns multiple values (Graphical Mapping CPI)
entry.content:
Dear CPI / Integration Fellows,

 

In the following mapping I am trying to get only one value to the target field, as this has the relation 1..1 

 

How can we make this happen? Is my mapping wrong?

entry.title: Re: I am trying to get the CR 2011 Trial license key for...
entry.content:
CR 2011 is end of life.

CR for Visual Studio only supports the latest 4.7 and 4.8 framework because of end of life by Microsoft.

Go here and find CR for VS and you'll get the latest SP 35 downloads:

https://www.sap.com/canada/products/technology-platform/crystal-reports.html

entry.title: Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP - Manual Deployed Fiori app not working
entry.content:
Hi,

During the learning I've deployed the risk-management app to my trial.

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp/exercise-performing-a-manual-deployment_d0546e9b-810f-41b1-b554-e2a01c9dc7b0 

However when I try to "Go" get the data I get this error.

 

When I check the batch call I see this:

The srv part crashes with this error:

 

It relates to this part of the code:

 

When I remove the generated "filter" part of the call to, it works fine:

 

I can even run it with either of the 2 filters... however when both are added (with an or) it fails:
  • IsActiveEntity eq false
  • SiblingEntity/IsActiveEntity eq null

Running it locally in BAS works as well.

Can anyone explain what might be wrong here ?

(sorry about all the images, but I got about 1000 errors trying to post about HTML being used in the post)

entry.title: Re: Few checks are not clearing in automatic EBS -SAP ECC...
entry.content: Hi Sanil, Thanks for the reverting Here is  more information, below is the Bank Statement line for the outgoing checks(payment) while in the EBS processing the system doesnot clear the check "7000180". The strange think is only few  cheques doesn't get cleared in EBS where as other get cleared hence no issue in Search string. Below is the sucess statement BRS line fyi Issue : Statement Line: 16,475,55914,Z,01192408150,0007000180/ Success : Statement: 16,475,28303,Z,04792110277,0007000196/

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports XI TLS1.2
entry.content:
That version had no idea of newer TLS 1.2 and thus it will never work with that security. CR was updated to support that security format.

Note, it has nothing to do with Crystal, Security is done through the Client, CR XI will not recognize the newer MS Clients that support TLS 1.2.

Upgrade to CR 2020 64 bit or 2016 32 bit is your only option

entry.title: Re: DEMO21
entry.content:
I am using DEMO21 - which is a Fully-Activated Appliance with additional demo content

the fiscal year's for Asset's are not CLOSED (and not current) for either company codes 1710 or 1010

entry.title: Re: how to send a url image, pdf file, text file to AL11
entry.content: Write to "AL11 directory" = ABAP statements OPEN DATASET, TRANSFER, etc. How to read attachments has been answered hundreds of times, there are some blog posts, code in GitHub repository, etc.

entry.title: Re: Even though gt_output2 is empty, the previous data is displayed.
entry.content: Probably you are instantiating the ALV control more than once without emptying the container: several ALV controls in the same container => only the first one is shown.

entry.title: Re: Barcode generation works fine only for first report /...
entry.content:
ERP software usually indicates it's some third party application of integration.

I suggest contacting the makers to debug the issue.

Off hand it suggests the routine to print is resetting the printer properties to default margins.

entry.title: Add Table of Contents to Hands-on Guide
entry.content:
Hello,

I am reaching out to know if there is a way to add Table of Contents to Hands-On Guide document in SAP Enable Now?

I couldn't see the Table of Contents option in the document settings. Let me know if there is a way to do that.

Thanks

entry.title: Connect SAP BTP to S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
I want to Deploy my Fiori app to Sap S4hana Public Cloud, I stuck in problem when try to create a Fiori app on SAP BAS
I am Follow this tutorials on SAP Developers, 

 Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials

I have done Step 2 and Step 3 

Communication system on SAP S4hana Cloud Side

 

Destination on SAP BTP Side 

Connection is fine 

My Problem:

I Think that there are any change in SAMLAssertion Authentication ? Because I have done this tutorial 5 months ago but now I'm facing the problem with same settings. The Error tell me that maybe my destination not works ? there are any setting that I'm missing

I'm waiting for yours solutions, 
Thanks

entry.title: Re: Sap Build App Community
entry.content: Hello Can you please answer my query posted on link : https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-build-app-bug/qaq-p/13616106

entry.title: Re: Download excel with multiple sheets using Transformation
entry.content:
To write to several cells, you must use one APPEND to the internal table per cell.

    ls_xls_cell-cell_content = fieldname_1.
    APPEND ls_xls_cell TO ls_xls_row-cells. " column A

    ls_xls_cell-cell_content = fieldname_2.
    APPEND ls_xls_cell TO ls_xls_row-cells. " column B

    ls_xls_cell-cell_content = fieldname_3.
    APPEND ls_xls_cell TO ls_xls_row-cells. " column C

What you did is to write to only one cell (i.e. only one APPEND), with field names separated with a horizontal tabulation, which writes all the field names into the same cell, not in several cells.

Concerning your issue about only one sheet being generated, I cannot reproduce, my program (based on yours with all non-compiling stuff removed) generates two sheets successfully.

entry.title: Solr search - searching for a field with hyphen in it
entry.content:
When I search with 123-456 for a field, I get results for all the products that has 123- in it, and all the products that has -456 in it.

Note: The field is a text field, fuzziness is not enabled. I am escaping - with a \\

I would like to get only products like xx123-456xx along with the 123-456 (obv)

Please guide me on how to achieve this. Thanks.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Convert Date from OData
entry.content:
Hello @ITM_Benedikt ,

 

Use the below function inside formula section to change the format you wish for.

FORMAT_DATETIME_LOCAL(date/time, format)

 Example

FORMAT_DATETIME_LOCAL("2019-07-11T13:06:15+03:00", "DD.MM.YYYY")

Output:

11.07.2019

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: How can I build Android app from SAP Build Apps
entry.content: In SAP Build App once you build your application then you can use Launch view and create build apk. You can also upload this app then in google play store.

entry.title: Re: output controller: spool request selection force printing on both sides
entry.content: How about setting printer settings as below?

entry.title: Client-side validation + Input sanitization = Intrusion Detection
entry.content:
Cloud applications are particularly vulnerable to intrusions via password reuse or via credentials found in a Github repository using said application. Such intrusions won't be detected by a Web Application Firewall. You may detect these as an anomalies with an Intrusion Detection System, maybe because the connection time or IP Geo-location is unusual, but the session will not be terminated automatically due to the high risk of a false positive.

Now, as attackers are likely to try escalating privileges or searching around for interesting information from this account, a better / complementary way to detect intrusion is to spread honeytokens: useless, deceptive elements such as cookies that hackers will have a hard time resisting interacting with and that normal users won't even notice. I talked about the efficiency of such a solution in my previous post, that you can find here: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/disinformation-for-the-greater-good/ba-p/13581083

Listen, Cédric: I don't have the time!

Right. As a developer swamped with feature requests and tight deadlines, it's hard to find the time to think about which element to deploy, to assess the risk of a false positive, and to implement honeytokens in a secure way. Doubly so if your application relies on a set of central services already dealing with session cookies and with the login form, leaving not much room for your creativity.

Hopefully, there is one particular interesting case where intrusion detection can be baked in, basically for free. Let me explain:

Input sanitization

- as a good developer, you are already sanitizing your inputs (of course you do).
- this means that when you receive a malformed input, that input is dropped, protecting the backend.

For example, this /search/:id endpoint expecting a positive number will discard a request for id "-1" or for id "a". But it's unlikely that you log rejected requests, am I right? As if it gets logged, it's unlikely to be considered an intrusion attempt, as a failed search could very much be due to a botched copy-paste action.

+ Client-side validation

Now let's talk about client-side validation for a second. For a long time, I've disregarded client-side validation as a security feature since it can easily be bypassed. Too many times I've seen developers thinking they were secure, blindly trusting client input to be sanitized. But I revised my position: as a standalone feature, client-side validation is useless for security. But combined with backend-side validation, it becomes extremely potent as it removes the uncertainty of being under attack: this /search request for id "-1" cannot anymore be due to a botched copy-paste. It must come from a user purposefully probing the backend, as a non-malicious user's input will be blocked at the client side.

= Intrusion Detection

What this means is that since you're already verifying that your search id is a positive number on the backend side, then all that's left to do (if not already done) is to verify the same thing on the client side, and to log rejected requests as intrusion attempts.

But I'm not vulnerable, they said!

Why log in the first place, since the endpoint is not vulnerable? The reason is that this endpoint in particular might not be vulnerable, but what about all the other ones? Raising a security event will help dramatically to reduce this dwell time of 16 days*. With such a very low risk of a false positive, the user session can be locked immediately before the attacker can find a valid entry point. And as attackers begin to be wary of such alerts, they will have to rely less and less on bypassing client-side validation, which will be beneficial to all applications still missing proper backend-side validation.

A big benefit worth a small effort, don't you think?

* according to Mendiant: https://www.infosecurity-magazine.com/news/cyber-intrusion-detection-time/

entry.title: Re: UKM_BP_DISPLAY missing search criteria country (kna1-land1)

entry.title: Getting status 404 during RUN TEST in Process Automation, all details are correct, What to do?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am having trouble in understanding the reason why RUN TEST option in create tab is showing status 404 ? All the details entered by me is correct. I have gone through the entire set up 4-5 times yet not able to find the root cause. Set up of BTP definition is correct, I have checked it thoroughly.

Right now I am using SAP Build Process Automation in free plan and instance has been created using the standard plan. My set up in create tab is also correct.

Help me out here to resolve this problem.

entry.title: Re: Getting status 404 during RUN TEST in Process Automation, all details are correct, What to do?
entry.content: BTP Destination is also correctly done.

entry.title: Is it possible to add 'agency' candidate type filter to help support recruiters with searches?
entry.content: Our candidate search allows for recruiters to search by candidate type - internal and external - but there is no option to filter on agency candidates. Is it possible to add this to the Candidate Type dropdown? If so, where is this configured?

entry.title: SAP Developer News, February 22nd, 2024
entry.content:
UI5 TypeScript Walkthrough: https://sap-samples.github.io/ui5-typescript-walkthrough/

'Did You Know' shorts Nr. 13 – Luigi - the enterprise-ready micro frontend framework

  • Luigi - Getting Started: https://docs.luigi-project.io/docs/getting-started

SAP Build and SAP Build Code – are they actually the same thing -Blog Post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-and-sap-build-code-comprehensive-tools-for-novice-to-expert/ba-p/13585174

SAP Build Hackathon Blog Post: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/participate-at-the-sap-build-hackathon-in-april-2024/ba-p/13613297

SAP Build Hackathon Registration Link: https://events.sap.com/eur/sap-build-hackathon/en/home

What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Q1 2024

  • What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Q1 2024: https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogarticleprintpage/blog-id/technology-blog-sap/article-id/168744
  • Initial Release of SAP Analytics Cloud Just Ask: https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogarticleprintpage/blog-id/technology-blog-sap/article-id/168424
  • What's New in SAP Datasphere in January: https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogarticleprintpage/blog-id/technology-blog-sap/article-id/168881
  • Bi-Directional Integration Between SAP Datasphere & SAP Analytics Cloud: https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogarticleprintpage/blog-id/technology-blog-sap/article-id/168781

 

=====================================================================

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro

0:08 UI5 TypeScript Walkthrough

0:38 'Did You Know' shorts Nr. 13 – Luigi - the enterprise-ready micro frontend framework

1:40  SAP Build and SAP Build Code – are they same?

3:55 What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Q1 2024

Transcript

[Nico]Hi everyone and welcome to the SAP Developer News. The famous and very popular UI5 walkthrough for JavaScript has received a revamp and is now also available for TypeScript. The walkthrough is a great resource for beginners and also serves as great documentation for core features of UI5. The TypeScript version is now available on GitHub, including live previews of each step. Check it out and see you soon.

[Srini]Did you know about Luigi? It is an enterprise-ready micro-Frontend framework from SAP. Here you can see the micro-frontend framework in action. This Luigi app can host different frontend applications such as a React app, a SAP UI5 SAP Fiori elements application, an Angular app, all within a single Luigi application. All these different front-end applications can be developed, tested, deployed, and maintained independently by very distributed disks. The documentation is available on this github page and you could try this quick 5 minute tutorial on introduction to luigi Hello everybody, we developers are always curious to try our hands-on new development tools.

[Rekha]Recently, we have heard a lot about SAP Build and SAP Build Code solutions. Although these two solutions sounds the same, let me tell you there is a stark difference between their new stages. What is SAP Build? SAP Build is a low code/no code solution that helps us to accelerate application development, automation and design business websites with drag-and-drop simplicity. These tools are designed keeping business experts in focus irrespective of their coding skills. Then, what is SAP Build code? A generative AI-based code development environment with a true copilot optimized for Java and JavaScript application development for seamless end-to-end coding, testing, integration, and Application Lifecycle Management. This tool is to be used by professionals or Fed developers. Would you like to know more differentials, use-key scenarios, fusion development concept using these two solutions? Then kindly refer to the blog post by our product expert, Franz Schermicke. We are not done yet. I have one more fascinating news. SAP is offering SAP Build Hackathon in the month of April. a 3D virtual event from 16th to 18th April. Now it's your chance to try out SAP Build solutions and get your hands dirty by creating business applications or automating mundane tasks that occur on your day-to-day business. Here you get to join our SAP Build experts, peers, to learn about low-code/no-code journeys, share ideas and experiences. Sounds great, right? For more details, check the blog post by product expert Manhil Nomaslu. Links for the blogs and hackathon registration is provided in the description box below. Until next time, keep building! Thank you!

[Vitaliy]Last weekend, the new 2024 QRC 1 version of SAP Analytics Cloud was released, and with that, the initial release of JustASK. Just ask is the new natural language query feature powered by AI. We just ask any user can query SAG data models by asking questions in everyday English. It supports acquired data models in SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere models. For all details about JustAsk and its configuration steps, please check the blog post by Francois Imberton. But don't forget to explore all Q1 release features with our experts demoing them. Links are in the description. SAP Datasphere product management prepared a what's new post for you as well. There were some interesting new features released last month, like SQL script in transformation flows, or the repository folders to organize the objects in your spaces. While we are discussing topics related to SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere, I would like to draw your attention to the brand new learnings available to help guide you through some key connectivity topics between both. This learning is brought to you by the SAP Enterprise Support Volume Apps organization. A one-time registration in SAP Learning Hub edition for SAP Enterprise Support using a valid S user might be required.

entry.title: Re: SAC Advanced Formulas Accumulated Values
entry.content:
@mayiya 

If you want to do this for multiple records you cannot use variable to accumulate as variable values are not cleared when next record arrives and it will keep adding up. Calculations will happen at lowest level only unless you aggregate explicitly. Use the below code it should work

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "VALOR"

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = BASEMEMBER([d/Date].[h/YQM], %01AnioProy%)
VARIABLEMEMBER #TotalAnioReal OF [d/Date]


INTEGER @i
INTEGER @x
INTEGER @Month
INTEGER @Iterate
INTEGER @AcumProy
INTEGER @NumMonth
@Month = MONTH(%02InicioProy%) // Parameter used for initial month of projection. In this example es 202309
@Iterate = 12 - @Month
@NumMonth = @Month - 1

DATA([d/Date] = #TotalAnioReal) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = "public.Actual")
DATA([d/Date] = %02InicioProy%) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #TotalAnioReal) / @NumMonth
FOR @i = 1 TO @Iterate
@x=@i-1
DATA([d/Date] = #TotalAnioReal) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #TotalAnioReal) + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = NEXT(@x, "MONTH", %02InicioProy%))
DATA([d/Date] = NEXT(@i, "MONTH", %02InicioProy%)) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #TotalAnioReal)/(@Month+@x)

ENDFOR

I did run a test and it gave me below results

But I still feel you can copy the value of September  into Oct to Dec, it will give you same results

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Need help with creating a canvas report for Time in Position field in Job info
entry.content:
Hi There

I need help with creating a canvas report for Time in Position field in Job info. Did anyone create such type of report before? if yes, could you share the steps.

Thanks in advance.

Pradeep

entry.title: How do we extract data from UKM_BP_DISPLAY by country as it works in FDK43 Transaction in SAP ECC?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We recently completed our migration to S4, which introduced a new Credit Management system. Previously, in our ECC environment, we utilized the FDK43 report, which allowed us to run reports by selecting countries through dynamic field selection. However, in the new system, the UKM_BP_DISPLAY report lacks the option to extract data by country. This report is used globally across almost 50,000 Business Partners (BPs), and our users are struggling to identify them by their respective countries.

I've thoroughly explored available options and noticed fields such as Nationality and Country/Region format, but unfortunately, inputting parameters into these fields results in a blank report. I'm eager to find a standard solution rather than resorting to development efforts, as I believe SAP should inherently support features that were available in FDK43.

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Lease interest is calculated monthly, although Frequency Rule is set to calculate on a yearly basis
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

We are currently testing Lease-in contracts with annual payment and have noticed that the interest is calculated monthly, although it is supposed to be calculated annually.
However, if we change the payment to "daily" in the frequency rule, the interest is calculated on a daily basis. So only the rule "yearly" does not work.

We have tested the scenario in another system and the annual calculation works correctly in there. But we could not find any difference in customizing between the two systems so far.

Has anyone also faced this issue or does know what might be the reason for that?

we are working on SAP S/4HANA 2020.

Please refer to the screenshots below.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Cloud with Google Workspace
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

 

We have a requirement to integrate with Google Workspace. 

1. Let us know the whole process.

2. How do we access Google Console.

3. Need help with achieving this integration.

 

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Cloud with Google Workspace
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

The supported scenarios are:

  • Export to Google Workspace
  • Upload General Journal Entries in Google Workspace

1. Let us know the whole process.

The whole process is described in the documentation Integrating SAP S/4HANA with Google Workspace Using SAP Document Management Service.

2. How do we access Google Console.

You can access the Google Console using the following link with your Google account: Google Cloud  

3. Need help with achieving this integration.

For more information, please check SAP Help Portal | Integrating Google Workspace

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: @EmanuelGraves so great to hear. May I ask what areas your most interested? There is so much great engagement in the community on so many topics. This is one you may want to take a look? Beginner Corner - SAP Community Happy to direct you if you have ideas. Best of luck.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone, Advanced Edition mobile app not loading screens
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

UI styles are not loading in SAP Build work zone advanced edition iPhone mobile app. Please find the screenshot for your reference and it is working fine in mobile browser and desktop. Kindly let me know if anything is missing,

entry.title: Re: Get to Know Your Post-Migration Profile
entry.content: Combo box styling looks like browser native, out of overall design context and it disappears when browser width reduced below 768px

entry.title: SAP HANA Cloud - Calculation Views Transparent Filters flag
entry.content:
Hello gurus

I am facing some issues during the calculation view creation on a BAS project that i should consume through a cap service. This is the aggregation scenario 

 

I have a cube. In the first projection there is another calculation view with a lot of fields. I have to create an aggregation to get a couple of measures. this is the content of Aggregation Node

 

To perform my aggregation i only need 3 fields CC_DESC, PS_TIPOLOGIA and PS_CONTRATTO_TERMINATO but I would like to use the QU_DESC just as a filter in the where condition. Conceptually, the query should be this one:

select CC_DESC, PS_TIPOLOGIA, PS_CONTRATTO_TERMINATO, sum(PS_ATTIVO_NUM) as total from table where QU_DESC = 'XXX' group by CC_DESC, PS_TIPOLOGIA, PS_CONTRATTO_TERMINATO

to do this, I did set QU_DESC as a Transparent Filter in my aggregation node

 

but unfortunately QU_DESC field is always in the group by so the measures of my aggregation is giving me a wrong result because it is considering QU_DESC in my group by.

 

 

 

 

I am in the same condition showed in the official documentation https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/develop-data-models-with-sap-hana-cloud/working-with-aggr...

 

so i am not understanding if it is due to my mistakes or i am facing a bug of Hana DB template project into BAS.

Any ideas?

Thanks in advance

KRs

Patty

entry.title: Solution Manager (without ChaRM) integration with Azure DevOps
entry.content:
Hello Respected members,

Our leaders are planning to use Azure DevOps , and part of integration is usign CTS+ in Solution Manager and then integrated ti Azure Devops. Currently we are only using Solution Manager for Transports management. 

My Qs is can we integrate Solution Manager with CTS+ (without ChaRM) to Azure DevOps?

entry.title: Re: Are BTP Solution Diagram Guidelines available?

entry.title: Re: Condition contract settlement accrual reversal: total...
entry.content:
Hi,

It is due to the missing/incorrect field name in the 'Field name Accruals Reversal Split' in the Profile for Business Volume determination configuration.

Please check your config again.

Regards,

Anjhi

entry.title: Sales Cloud Version 2 odata for create Case type - Notes error
entry.content:
I have an issue in create a case service in Sales Cloud V2, in the parameters, always receiving an error that Note ID is invalid, which Note ID should be added?

Also is there any more documentation about the ODATA APIS for V2?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to restrict personal information fields from ODATA API Entity Query
entry.content:
We are building OData API based integration with an external application- Nakisa. To achieve this, I had created an exclusive API security role in EC through manage permission Roles.  

As a security measure, all non-mapped personal information fields have been excluded from the RBP selection. However, many of the fields continue to appear when the API entity gets queried in postman (api testing tool) 

For instance, Marital Status field under Employee Central Effective Dated Entities has been excluded, but they continue to appear if the API entity PerPersonal is being queried. Same goes with fields from Employee Data section- Date of Birth which continues to appear when API entity PerPerson gets queried.

I feel the RBP has no effect on these fields. Is there any way to control these from getting exposed through API.

entry.title: Re: How to implement a custom entity in the ABAP RESTful Programming Model using remote function mod
entry.content:
Hi all,
In my current ABAP RAP development, there is only one field that i can´t get from CDS views ( Long Text ), only using API from SAP API HUB (/A_Product('{Product}')/to_ProductBasicText).

I´ve created an ABAP Class in order to read the API payload but now i need know how do i call this custom ABAP class and combine the value from API with current CDS fields please. It is possible?

Thanks in advance,
Mauricio
ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model 
SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Re-fetching previously fetched standard recordings
entry.content:
I had downloaded the S4 standard recordings at the beginning of a project and deleted everything we did not require. I've reconnected to the workarea containing the standard recordings, but can no longer fetch what I need (no fetch button). I know I can import them using the import feature, but that takes an eternity and often times out. Does anyone know if a way where I can fetch specific content once again?

 

Thx

entry.title: Re: Summarizing a group column
entry.content:
DistinctCount - of course. As Homer Simpson would say, "D'oh!"

Thanks for the reply.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Replication Flow from S/4HANA to Amazon S3
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP Datasphere has introduced a new feature, 'Replication Flows.' This new capability (now available with Amazon S3) allows for the process of copying multiple tables from one source to another, offering a fast and seamless experience in data management. For detailed insights into replication flows and their functionalities, please refer to our comprehensive guide.

In this blog, we'll provide a step-by-step tutorial on replicating data from SAP S/4HANA to Amazon S3, showcasing the practical application and efficiency of this new feature in real-world scenarios.

The steps outlined below are the same for SAP S/4HANA On-Premise and SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Now, let's dive in. We'll walk you through each step necessary to effectively utilize 'Replication Flows' for transferring data from SAP S/4HANA to Amazon S3.

Steps:

1. To start, you will need to create a connection in your SAP Datasphere instance to Amazon S3.

2. Please ensure you have a Dataset in your Amazon S3 that you would like to replicate the tables into.

3. Make sure you have a source connection (Cloud or On-Premise). In this case, we will be using S/4HANA On-Premise. You will need to create this connection in the Connections tab in SAP Datasphere.

4. Navigate to SAP Datasphere and click on Data Builder on the left panel. Find and click the “New Replication Flow” tile.

5. Once you are in ‘New Replication Flow’ Click on ‘Select Source Connection’.

6. Choose the source connection you want. We will be choosing SAP S/4 HANA On-Premise
7. Next, click on ‘Select Source Container’.

8. Choose CDS Views and then click Select.

9. Click “add source objects” and choose the views you want to replicate. You can choose multiple if needed. Once you finalize the objects, click add selection.

10. Now, we select our target connection. We will be choosing S3 as our target. If you experience any errors during this step, please refer to the note at the end of this blog.

11. Next we choose the target container. Recall the dataset you created in S3 earlier in step 2. This is the container you will choose here.



12. In the middle selector, click ”settings” and set your load type. ‘Initial only’ means to load all selected data once. ‘Initial and delta’ means that after the initial load, you want the system to check every 60 minutes for any changes (delta) and copy the changes to the target.

13. Once done, click on the edit projections icon on the top toolbar to set any filters and mapping. For more information on filters and mapping, please refer here, and here.

14. You also have the ability to change the write settings to your target through the settings icon next to the target connection name and container.

15. Finally, rename the replication flow to the name of your choosing in the right details panel. Then, save, deploy, run the replication flow through the top toolbar icons. You can monitor the run in the “data integration monitor” tab on the left panel in SAP Datasphere.

16. When the replication flow is done, you should see the target tables in Amazon (AWS) S3 as such. It should be noted that every table will have 3 columns added from the replication flow to allow for delta capturing. These columns are operation_flag, recordstamp, and is_deleted.

Note: You may have to include Premium Outbound Integration block in your tenant to deploy the replication flow.

 

Conclusion

Congratulations on successfully setting up a replication flow from SAP S/4HANA to Amazon S3!
 This integration exemplifies the power and efficiency of using SAP Datasphere's ‘Replication Flow’ feature for streamlined data management. Should you have any inquiries or need further assistance, feel free to leave a comment below. Your feedback and questions are invaluable to us.
Thank you for following this guide and stay tuned for more insights on leveraging SAP Datasphere for your data integration needs!

entry.title: Unraveling the SAP DataSphere: Insights in bite-sized pieces
entry.content:
SAP DataSphere is the next generation of SAP Data Warehouse Cloud that supports enterprise databases. It provides an integrated environment for data entry, indexing, word modeling, cluster storage, and virtualization. Comprehensive data services erected on the SAP Business Technology platform to give all data professionals with easy and scalable access to critical business data. This enables organizations to simplify their data warehouse environments by processing data from SAP and third-party cloud and on-premises environments into a single, fully integrated cloud environment. This feature was introduced in 2019 and renamed in March 2023. Generating large amounts of data, SAP dataSphere offers advantages such as scalability, cost savings, accessibility and data security. In addition to SAP DataSphere, SAP Analytics Cloud provides advanced analytics, planning and forecasting capabilities and the ability to activate data for decision-making, and SAP Digital Boardroom is an add-on that provides decision makers with the most informed information.

 

 

Benefits of SAP DataSphere

  • A secure environment that supports many data application requirements, including real-time analytics, database access management, and data science (machine learning).
  • Space provides a secure modeling environment for multiple departments or use cases.
  • Connectivity to multiple data sources is guaranteed, including SAP and non-SAP clouds and data lakes.
  • No-code and low-code architecture to support custom modeling needs of business users.
  • Seamless integration with SAP Analytics Cloud, using Microsoft Excel and the O Data public API to support the use of other clients, tools and applications.
  • Multiple visualizations and robust data analysis and visualization.
  • Graphical effects and genetic analysis to visualize changes in data movement and other dependencies.
  • Spatial collaboration and geospatial sharing to combine files with external sources that support low security.
  • Metamodels and data models in SAP Business Warehouse and SAP SQL Data Warehouse implementations.

 

Will SAP DataSphere Replaces BW4HANA

 

For more information regarding this you can go through this blog.

Why Your Business Needs SAP Datasphere: A Technical Deep Dive

In the age of information overload, managing and utilizing data effectively is no longer a luxury, but a necessity. SAP Datasphere emerges as a powerful solution, offering a comprehensive data management platform built for the modern enterprise. But why exactly is it essential, and what technical aspects make it stand out? Let's dive deep into the reasons why your business needs SAP Datasphere:

1. Conquering the Data Silos:

Imagine a world where data flows freely, unconstrained by isolated systems and inconsistent formats. That's the magic of SAP Datasphere. It acts as a central hub, seamlessly integrating data from diverse sources, both SAP and non-SAP. This includes ERP systems, customer databases, social media feeds, IoT sensors, and more. Think of it as breaking down data silos and creating a unified landscape, where every piece of information contributes to the bigger picture.

2. Data Management Nirvana:

Integration is just the first step. SAP Datasphere empowers you to manage your data effectively with a robust set of tools:

  • Data Cataloging: No more data black boxes! Catalog your data assets for clear understanding and efficient discovery.
  • Semantic Modeling: Ensure consistency and context across systems by defining business rules and relationships between data elements.
  • Data Governance: Implement robust security and access controls to maintain data integrity and compliance.
  • Data Quality Management: Identify and correct errors, ensuring your data is reliable and trustworthy.

3. Flexibility Tailored to Your Needs:

No two businesses are alike, so SAP Datasphere offers a flexible architecture to suit your specific needs. Choose from various solutions:

  • Data Warehousing: Store and analyze massive historical data volumes for in-depth insights.
  • Data Federation: Access and analyze data from multiple sources without physically moving it, ideal for distributed environments.
  • Data Virtualization: Provide on-demand access to data without impacting performance, perfect for real-time analytics.

4. Democratizing Data Access:

Data shouldn't just be confined to data scientists. SAP Datasphere fosters a culture of data-driven decision-making by empowering everyone in your organization:

  • Self-Service Data Access: Business analysts, executives, and even non-technical users can explore and analyze data independently through intuitive tools.
  • Collaboration and Sharing: Facilitate collaboration and knowledge sharing across teams with secure data access controls.

5. A Foundation for Advanced Analytics:

SAP Datasphere isn't just about data management; it's a springboard for advanced analytics. It seamlessly integrates with SAP Analytics Cloud, allowing you to:

  • Transform data into actionable insights: Leverage powerful visualization and analytics tools to uncover hidden patterns and trends.
  • Predictive Analytics and Machine Learning: Utilize cutting-edge AI capabilities to forecast future outcomes and make data-driven decisions.

Technical Advantages:

  • Open Architecture: Integrates with various data sources and tools, offering flexibility and customization.
  • Cloud-Native Design: Scalability and agility to handle demanding data workloads.
  • Security and Compliance: Robust security features to ensure data privacy and regulatory compliance.
  • API-Driven Development: Enables automation and integration with existing workflows.

How SAP DataSphere is different from SAP Analytics Cloud

  • SAP DataSphere is for data storage, data governance, and data security. SAC is just a reporting tool with limited data management capabilities.
  • DataSphere is designed for long-term data storage and a centralized data management system, SAC aims to create an interactive dashboard and application used by end users.
  • DataSphere is the data source and SAC is the data consumer.
  • Both are seamlessly integrated but you will have to pay a separate subscription fee.
  • DataSphere provides ETL functionality and complex replication flows, but SAC does not.
  • DataSphere also provides advanced data classification and modeling options and SAC does not offer advanced modeling.
  • DataSphere has relatively high capacity and memory usage compared to SAC.
  • We can integrate the two solutions in both directions.
  • Using data sphere we can just preview the data, but we cannot build advanced data insights. SAC can also be used to do collaborative enterprise planning.

 

How can you integrate SAP DataSphere and SAP Analytics Cloud

Integration Methods:

  1. Live Data Connection:

    • SAP Datasphere as a Live Source in SAC:

      1. In SAC, navigate to Connections and select "Add Connection."
      2. Choose "Live Data" and then "SAP Datasphere."
      3. Enter connection details like hostname and port.
      4. Select specific data entities or tables to connect to.
      5. This allows real-time analysis of data directly from Datasphere within SAC.
    • Prefer this video.

    • SAC as a Live Source in Datasphere:

      1. Currently, direct live connections from SAC to Datasphere are not supported.

  2. Data Loading and Transfer:

    • Datasphere Data to SAC:

      1. Use Cloud Data Integration in Datasphere to create a data flow or replication task.
      2. Load data from Datasphere tables into SAC models or data sets.
      3. This enables historical analysis and transformation of data within SAC.

    • SAC Data to Datasphere:

      1. Use the OAuth client in SAC to connect to Datasphere.
      2. Develop scripts or tools to load data from SAC models or data sets into Datasphere.
      3. This allows further processing, enrichment, or archiving of data in Datasphere.

  3. Other Integration Options:

    • ODBC and JDBC Drivers: Connect to Datasphere via ODBC or JDBC drivers directly within SAC for ad-hoc analysis.
    • OData Services: Expose specific Datasphere entities as OData services accessible from SAC for data exploration.      

For integration you can prefer this tutorial or this blog.

entry.title: Pass dynamic parameter to a table
entry.content:
hi All, 

I need some help filtering my table with all members.

I tried this code without success.

var resultSet = Table_Scenario.getDataSource().getMembers("ZCP_DM_CCIND");

var memberInfos = ArrayUtils.create(Type.MemberInfo);
for ( i = 0; i < resultSet.length; i++)
{ var member = resultSet[i];
var memberId = member.id; var memberDescription = member.description; memberInfos.push({id: memberId, description: memberDescription}); }
Table_Scenario.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("ZCP_DM_CCIND", memberInfos);
console.log(memberInfos); 

Thanks in advance 

Rosanna

#sac #story 2.0

Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 3

entry.content:
We haven't started the C4C Meshup config yet

This is SAP Backend API, not sure how it can be excueted from Postman, it works from Buildapps using BTP Destination

We want to create a page Parameter to read the Account id from the C4C Screen and pass that to S/4HANA system to query List based on Account.

entry.title: move bank account to new company code
entry.content:
Hi

I am hoping someone can help me with this situation.

We have a company code 1000 with name ABC incorporation. We opened a bank account in same name and it is feeding daily statements into the system since past two years.

The entity has been sold but is partially owned so for that we create 9xxx company code. We have created new company 9999 with same name. We want to transfer the bank account from 1000 to 9999, can someone guide me with all the steps required to do it.

I was thinking to close it in 1000 and open it in 9999 so new statements will come in new company code but how do i bring in the balance in the bank account from 1000 to 9999. is there a SAP functionality for that?

entry.title: Re: Re-fetching previously fetched standard recordings
entry.content: If the Fetch button is not there (and I assume the orange dot is also missing?) then it looks like it still has a local copy. Delete it (again) once the connected area is there, and try again. You may need to delete them from the server trash to make sure it can't find them.

entry.title: Re: Add Table of Contents to Hands-on Guide
entry.content: There are no headings in the hands-on guide, so a Table of Contents makes no sense.

entry.title: Re: aATP - Need to round the order confirmation to materi...
entry.content: Thank you for your time, Lakshmipathi. I cannot use material master as to ship in pack qty requirement is only for specific customers. I do not see this field in Customer Material Info record.

entry.title: Re: Rule to be implemented on blocking deliveries and iss...
entry.content: Generally delivery is made the same day if not the next day maximum, The problem is that when preparing the delivery, the preparation team is obliged to put a quantity either lower or higher than the quantity ordered, for the case where the quantity delivered is greater than the quantity ordered, we can tolerate the blocking, but if the quantity of the delivery is less than that of the order, we do not see the point of blocking the delivery, we want to authorize all deliveries for which the quantity (the total amount of the delivery) is less than the quantity of the released order. I would really appreciate it if you help us find a solution.

entry.title: Re: Looking to execute HTTP Request using body in SPA

Since it's not in the tutorial, do I need it? It appears that I can't delete it but I have no idea what to do with it.

entry.title: Re: How to use CDS views in HANA Calculation view?

crepmaster, are you doing this preview in a 2 client system? The client handling algorithm may be using client number which is your ABAP client and has no data.

Curious if you got this working.

entry.title: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Release 2402
entry.content:
As follow-up to our previous release 2311, this blog post provides an update concerning our most recent release 2402, which is available for customers and partners since last weekend. This particular release features highlights such as a Bring-your-own-Git capability, support for Enterprise Search and Data Replication from ABAP.

All available new features can be found on the official release notes page.

Bring-your-own git

You can now connect own Git repositories to your ABAP environment system via the Manage Software Components app. This allows you to manage the lifecycle of software components in a customer-chosen Git service as well as to connect custom CI/CD services. Please note that changes to the code in Git are only allowed through transport requests in the system (details).

Enterprise Search

With enterprise search, it is possible to create a CDS-based search model via enterprise search annotations. These annotations refer to a suitable CDS view entity which can be either reused or created from scratch (details).

Data Replication with ABAP as a Source

The ABAP environment can now be used as source for data replication to SAP Datasphere. The replication scenario covers both initial load and delta extraction as well as replication from public and custom CDS view entities (details).

SOAP Provider Model

The SOAP Provider Model now allows you to expose SOAP services for inbound communication. The description of the service is done via a WSDL file (details).

ABAP Development Tools

  • Support for SAP-provided CDS aspects to store field definitions and calculations, such as CDS expressions
  • Support for displaying system client in editor tab (details)
  • Enhancements to the refactoring functionality for ABAP classes and interfaces (details)
  • Availability of the server-driven UI editor for ILM objects (ILMB) (details)

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

  • Support for the definition of static and instance feature control for fields which have been added for key user extensibility
  • Support for generating custom OData UI services based on RAP BO interfaces using a generator wizard

Administration & Operations

  • Support for displaying and analyzing ABAP runtime errors with the new ABAP Runtime Errors app (details)
  • Support for displaying dependency of scope items in business role templates (details)
  • Support for displaying components to which a restriction type belongs to create incidents (details)
  • Support for using additional metrics for e-mail transmissions and changes to database table entries in the Health Monitoring app (details)
  • Support for using additional metric for e-mail transmissions in SAP Cloud ALM (details)
  • Support for copying restrictions from a deprecated restriction type using Mass Change Wizard (details, details)
  • Support for monitoring system workload with focus on metrics such as ABAP and HANA CPU time as well as processing time (details)
  • Enhancements to the monitoring screens for sampled work process data (details)
  • Support for merging of spaces or pages in the SAP Fiori Launchpad via respective apps

Continuous Integration and Delivery

  • Support for MANAGE_SOFTWARE_COMPONENTS API to work with software components on ABAP Environment systems

Infrastructure

  • Support for elastic scaling of application servers (blog post and details)

Integration & Connectivity

  • Support for adding the AIR key to a SOAP request in the HTTP header (details)
  • Support for configuring event filters for outbound event topics via Enterprise Event Enablement - Maintain Event Channel Binding app (details)
  • Support for integrating enterprise event enablement with Advanced Event Mesh service plan (details)
  • Support for the specification of customized OAuth scopes in communication arrangements
  • Availability of the new function module RS_ABAP_GET_NAMETAB_INFOS_E in ATC scenarios, which comes with new versions of the source code extractor notes bundled in the SAP Note (details)
  • Support for Refresh Allowed checkbox and Refresh Token Expiry Time in communication systems (details)
  • Support for displaying dependency of scope items in communication scenarios (details)

Additional Information

You can find the product page on SAP BTP, ABAP Environment | SAP Help Portal

For technical documentation, please refer to our Standalone Documentation.

Please refer to SAP BTP, ABAP environment Roadmap for more details about planned features as part of the product roadmap.

As always, please let us know if you have questions.

Stay healthy and take care!

entry.title: Re: Extend CDS View with a new field and ValueHelp
entry.content:
Hi,

It seems you are using the "old way" of adding value helps. You should use @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition instead.

Please see the examples in RAP Feature Showcase - Value Help 

Hope it helps.

Regards.

I have created used the existing tenant certificate and used my cert's alias name in the client certificate authentication via HTTP Request call. but the Certificate is not being passed and dont see the CN name in the api-gateway logs. Please help me in solving how to use enable mutual tls via client cert authentication

 

THanks

SAP BTP Security

entry.title: Help on PCR Reading
entry.content:
Hi,

I'd appreciate if anyone can help me understand the following PCR step by step.

Z041 Create /1VE

*

     ****

          VWTCL 67 Processing class

               *

                    ADDWT * OT Output table

               E

                    ADDWT * OT Output table

                    ADDWT&/1VE VAR   Variable table

 

Z022 Vacation Percentage calculation

*

5052 Vacation Percentage       *

AMT= /1VE Set

AMT +& /1VE Addition

ADDWT&ITRl VAR Variable table

MULTI ANA Multipl.amt/no/rate

AMT/100     Division

ADDWT&ITR2 VAR Variable table

AMT /1VE Addition

AMT +& /1VE Addition

ADDWT&ITR3 VAR Variable table

MULTI ANA Multipl.amt/no/rate

AMT/100  Division

ADDWT * OT Output table

ADDWT&ITR4 VAR Variable table

entry.title: Re: CDS Value help not working in List report Object Page
entry.content: This was just the thing I was struggling with for some time. Thank you very much for the solution!

entry.title: Extending the ESG Data Foundation in SAP Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:
This is second part of Extensibility blogs, where we want to show how to build extensions to the ESG Data Foundation in SAP Sustainability Control Tower. In the first part we outlined how the ESG Data Foundation is build and what entities it entails.  

In this blog we will outline how to extend the Data Foundation and how to supply data for such extensions with our solution. Enjoy the read and leave comments below if you like.  

Extension Concept 

SAP SCT provides extensibility capabilities for Data Provider Interfaces (DPI), their contained measures and dimensions. There are features to extend existing DPIs with up to ten new dimensions. In addition, there is a feature set to define custom measures for a generic DPI and define up to 20 custom dimensions for this.  

Extension Artifacts 

To build a custom extension in SAP Sustainability Control Tower there are three extension artifacts necessary.  

  • Custom Measure = Horizontal Extension of existing Data Provider Interface to accommodate new semantic values for metric building.
  • Custom Dimension = Vertical Extension of existing Data Provider Interface with additional fields for grouping, filtering and other analytical purposes. 
  • Custom Metric = Calculation of a metric using measures and dimensions 

Creating a custom measure and dimensions for existing (People) DPI

Let’s consider a Scenario: Users wants to create new sustainability metrics : Percentage of employees working from home per Department (HR, IT) with their own custom measures and dimensions fulfilling the organization's needs. 

The illustration below shows how the People DPI can be extended. We add a new measure “Z_TOT_HEADCOUNT” that can be used to gather data for number of people with a dimension “Z_WFH_HEADCOUNT” who work from home for a certain department.

With this scenario in mind let’s see what steps user needs to perform in order to get data in your sustainability metrics : 

1. Using the Manage Custom Dimensions application, Create the new dimension “Z_WFH_HEADCOUNT”. Make sure to assign it to People DPI. 

2. Using the Manage Measures application, Create the new measure “Z_TOT_HEADCOUNT”. Link the dimension Z_WFH_HEADCOUNT with the measure.

3. Upload the master data using the process template “Master data- Custom values”. In our example, Master data values should contain People working from home in HR department, People working from home in IT department.  

 

 

4. In Manage ESG data Application, select the newly created measure Z_TOT_HEADCOUNT and upload period specific data. Now this data can be uploaded monthly, yearly or quarterly. This is one way of uploading the data. Users should be able to upload custom data also using APIs which are published in SAP Business Accelerator Hub.  

5. Using Manage metrics application, create new metrics of type "Advanced”= Percentage of employees working from home per Department. Select the newly created measure and dimension. 

6. For our calculations : Percentage of Employees working from home per Department = SUM(Z_WFH_HEADCOUNT where DEPT= HR)+ SUM(Z_WFH_HEADCOUNT where DEPT= IT) / Z_TOT_HEADCOUNT. To make use of this calculation, user needs to model these custom measures and values in CPE EXT environment. For more info refer here. 

7. To view the above calculated values, user will have to navigate to SCT environment and execute the process template- “Actuals- Create new records for Advanced Custom metrics”. Data validation and persistence should be checked here. If the user does not encounter any errors, Data is successfully persisted.   

Activate the newly created sustainability metrics tile from Manage metrics app and view the results in My Ambition app.  

 

Summary 

The ESG Data Foundation provides a valuable platform for reporting on various regulations and standards by allowing the inclusion of custom measures and dimensions. This feature enables our partners and customers to expand the range of sustainability metrics available to their organizations. This flexibility empowers users to enhance their reporting capabilities and effectively address the diverse requirements of sustainability initiatives.

entry.title: Re: IPS - saving a custom attribute
entry.content: Hi Marco, were you able to get it working with userid feild?

entry.title: SAP Successfactors Recruiting Groups Management through OData API
entry.content:
Dear SAP community, 

While trying to use Successfactor API to manage roles/groups externally i considered to used the provided OData API from Successfactors.

After some investigation i noticed that i could not manage the Recruiting Groups using the API at the moment which is also mentioned in note 2824565 from 2019.

It is considered in the roadmap as per Note 2251702 but that note has almost 2 years and neither a target date neither release date has been provided until today.

I kindly ask you to help with my influence post so we can try to have this feature which i assume as important for multiple companies as it helps to have a central instance to manage roles in multiple applications (SAP on-premise, SAP on-cloud and also non SAP systems).

Link for influence: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/316094

Thank you!

SAP SuccessFactors HXM Core OData API SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central integration to SAP Business Suite #Recruiting Groups

entry.title: Re: Unable to activate alerts for Health Monitoring in Cl...
entry.content:
Hi Tripti,

Thank you for submitting your question. The reason why the metrics are inactive is due to the role assignment for your user. I have tested this extensively and the metrics will only be un-editable when the role assigned is Health Monitoring Viewer, the role only allows to view health overview and metrics of cloud services.

The role Health Monitoring Administrator allows Create, edit, delete, and manage configuration settings, including the display of monitoring data. I have attached a screenshot for reference of the role required.

Once the role has been assigned and saved you will need to logout of the SAP Cloud ALM Tenant for the changes to take effect, then log back in and it should be worker fine.

Best Regards,

Ian

entry.title: Re: Compound Employee-How to retrieve records modified within a date range
entry.content: This is a fantastic description of the periodDelta query mode. Well done!

entry.title: How to solve error CK465 during standard cost estimate creation?
entry.content:
During Standard Cost Estimate (CK11N), the error CK465 "No price could be determined for material/batch A plant B" is triggered. What is the reason and how to solve it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to solve error CK465 during standard cost estimat...
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


There are a few reasons that could trigger this error. Please check below KBA for the completed explanation and solution:

3375623 - How to solve error CK465 in standard cost estimate creation


Best Regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: SAC Advanced Formulas Accumulated Values
entry.content: Nikhil you're a genius. Thanks for sharing your knowledge!! It works !!

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing and EWM Integration using Manage Staging 2.0 app
entry.content: How is tool management integrated with EWM in digital manufacturing?

entry.title: Re: DEMO21
entry.content:
Hi Naga, the SAP S/4HANA Customer Care/ RIG team evaluated your question and provided the answer below. I hope it addresses your issue:

"Since S/4HANA 2021, Fiori App F7312 Make Company Code Settings – Asset Accounting Specific substitutes Execute/Undo Year-End Closing to open/close AA periods. You need to download the Test Script of the Scope Item J62 and there you will find how to do it."

Regards, Eduardo Tagusagawa with the answer provided by the SAP S/4HANA Customer Care/ RIG team.

entry.title: Re: Deprecated features in Latest Goal Management
entry.content: @Julia_Gaskell the tasks will still be visible on a Form (but there will be no option to edit them in the edit dialogue because the edit dialogue is a replication of the Goals edit dialogue) but not on the goal plan. I suggest to migrate Tasks to Milestones using Import Performance Goals tool by exporting them first adhoc reporting first. This will work for active (and already converted) goal plans.

entry.title: Unable to see my blogs in one place?
entry.content:
How do I see my blogs

In the post section I see both but I want to see just my blogs and questions I posted separately?

The way it was before why do this keep changing?

In screenshot below 1st and 2nd are questions and 3rd blog how do I seperate?

 

 

Regards

Vinita

entry.title: Expose UI5 app to external User
entry.content:
I want to develop an application for my vendors.Using BTP (neo) Is it possible to expose UI5 application connected to on-promise s4hana (through Odata) for users out of my environment ?

 

If possible, how can mange authentication ( can I creat users on BTP for login ).

 

Appreciated your any other idea. Or referances to implement this through BTP.

entry.title: Re: Unable to activate alerts for Health Monitoring in Cl...
entry.content:
Thank you Ian for the response. I did check the roles my user have and I was missing Health monitoring Viewer role. I assigned the role but still the same problem. Ia hve attached the screenshot in the main question. I did logout and tried.

---I tried again and it worked--- Thank you Ian

Regards

Tripti

entry.title: Re: Need to create a SLD bridge between Systems to LAMA t...
entry.content:
Hello,

Solution Manager receives the various data suppliers from the SLD or directly from the managed systems (since 7.2 SP9). It's recommended that managed systems send directly to Solution Manager to avoid problems that are difficult to troubleshoot. There is no LAMA integration guide on the Solution Manager side. It's not sure if the LAMA team has one.

Useful guides for sending the data suppliers to Solution Manager:
3232202 - Guided Answer for Troubleshooting for missing or outdated LMDB data suppliers in SAP Solution Manager and SAP Focused Run
https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sm/3362967988.html

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Hello Guys
SAP MDK Data table Save
entry.content:
Hi All,

Created a Data Table and enabled the Inline edit for the entries.

Can anyone help with restricting few columns for editing.

Also, How can the table data be posted on "Save" action?

Any sample code should be great.

Thanks,

Deepthi.

entry.title: Re: S4 2022 Batch Characteris Entry Required ,but MSC1N Character mandatory ,but not work.
entry.content: no body knew that?

entry.title: Notification when Communication user is locked
entry.content:
Hi;

Is there a way to get our internal support team notified once a communication user is locked? We had an issue where additional api validation caused one of our communication being locked resulting in subsequent business process to fail.

It would be ideal if we can configure a notification email once a communication is locked.

Thanks

Thomas
